Found three differences

  ± value change in multiline text (eleven inserts, one deletion)

    + {
    +   "effect": "allow",
    +   "actions": [
    +     "read",
    +     "write"
    +   ],
    +   "resources": [
    +     "*"
    +   ]
    + }
    +

  ± value change
    - {"debug":false,"timeout":30}
    + {"debug":true,"timeout":30}

  ± value change

    + this is a different string
